bird.name: 黑嘴端鳳頭燕鷗
bird.summary: 中华凤头燕鸥（台湾作黑嘴端鳳頭燕鷗，学名：Thalasseus bernsteini） ，也称作黑嘴凤头燕鷗，是燕鷗科的一种海鸟，种名来自德国动物学家 Heinrich Agathon Bernstein；模式标本编号 RMNH 87602。 特徵 體長約 38 公分，羽色為淺…

relations.subject: 黑嘴端鳳頭燕鷗
relations.evidence: The decline is thought to be due to past hunting and egg collection for food
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 黑嘴端鳳頭燕鷗
relations.evidence: A Chinese survey team led by Chen Shuihua stated that the bird was "on the verge of extinction". It is currently threatened by illegal egg collection, typhoons, and disturbance of nesting colonies by fishermen
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
